allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Id 21888 | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, Path")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\"ProcessId=19060\\" | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Stop-Process -Id 21888 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 19060 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; netstat -ano | Select-String ':5050|:5173'")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\"ProcessId=16636\\" | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List")
